support_desc: If MyPrograms has helped you stay organized, you can consider buying me a coffee via Kreosus!

story_sections.title: The Story of MyPrograms
body: I started developing MyPrograms because I needed a simple, fast, and privacy-respecting way to manage my own academic life. As a student, I was tired of complex cloud systems that track every move, expensive subscriptions, and apps filled with ads.
I decided to build something different: a 100% free, ad-free, and local-first academic planner. Every line of code in this project was written by me during the spare time between classes and exams.

story_sections.title: Why Should You Support?
body: As a solo developer, building and maintaining an application requires a lot of time and effort. My goal is to keep MyPrograms completely free for all students forever.
Your support helps me cover basic costs and motivates me to add new features such as cloud synchronization.
